flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Loyola Marymount University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($53.5k → $62.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Loyola Marymount University rose 15% between 2007 and 2010 ($31.8k → $36.6k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Loyola Marymount University rose 15% between 2007 and 2010 ($13.5k → $15.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Loyola Marymount University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).
